name: distill-locally
description: Local knowledge-distillation study: DeepSeek-R1:8b -> Qwen3-0.6B for structured text enrichment, evaluated per sub-task with a control-anchored three-judge panel.
comment: Self-contained: the analysis scripts in server/eval use only Node built-ins and reproduce every reported metric offline from the committed scorecard (data/eval/scores*.json) with no API keys. Regenerating the judge grades (score.mjs) needs keys.
